data.title: EU defence ministers to focus on Ukraine support at Copenhagen meeting, Denmark says
data.description: Support for Ukraine and its defence industry will be the most important topic when EU defence ministers meet in Copenhagen on Friday, Denmark's Defence Minister Troels Lund Poulsen told reporters.

data.title: Remy Cointreau Adjusts FY26 View
Remy Cointreau lowers tariff impact estimates after US-EU deal
data.description:
Remy Cointreau cut on Friday its forecast impact of U.S. tariffs on European imports after the U.S. and the EU reached a trade agreement.

The French spirits group now expects a net impact of 20 million euros ($23.41 million) from U.S. tariffs on its current operating profit for the 2025-26 fiscal year, down from 35 million it estimated previously.

($1 = 0.8542 euros)

data.title: India's NALCO gains on 300 bln-rupee investment plan for new smelter, coal plant
data.description:
** National Aluminium Company (NALCO) rises 1.2% to 186.7 rupees; top pct gainer on Nifty metal index

** MD says state-run co to invest 300 bln rupees ($3.43 bln) in new smelter and coal power plant over next five years

** Adds co in talks with Coal India , NTPC to set up coal power plant at 120 bln rupees; COAL, NTPC trade flat

** Remaining funds will be used to set up smelter in Odisha

** Separately, NALCO looking to buy new coal, bauxite mines in India

** Co says additional 25% U.S. tariffs led to surge in alumina availability in India, pressuring domestic market

** YTD, NALCO, COAL, NTPC falls 14%, 3%, 1.5%, respectively

data.title: Russian GDP grows 1.2% in H1 2025 - Rosstat
data.description:
Russian GDP grew an estimated 1.2% year-on-year in H1 2025, the Federal State Statistics Service (Rosstat) said, as per Interfax.Rosstat said in the middle of August that GDP grew an estimated 1.1% in Q2 after rising 1.4% in Q1 2025.The Central Bank in July kept its April forecast of 1.0%-2.0% GDP growth for the year unchanged. It said in a commentary to the forecast that GDP grew an estimated 1.8% in Q2 2025, while Rosstat estimated growth for the quarter at 1.1%.In its baseline scenario in April, the Russian Economic Development Ministry predicted 2.5% GDP growth in 2025 and 2.4% in 2026. It will unveil an adjusted forecast at the start of September, and is likely to lower its estimate for the year.Analysts surveyed by Interfax at the start of August forecast GDP will grow 1.4% in 2025 and 1.7% in 2026.

mrchub.com

data.title: China's ZTE slumps most in nearly 5 months as H1 profit drops
data.description:
** Hong Kong shares of ZTE Corporation fall 8.4% to HK$35.36, on track for the biggest one-day pct drop since April 7

** Second biggest pct loser on Hang Seng sub-index tracking information technology firms (.HSCIIT)

** Co's Shenzhen-listed stock falls 5% to 45.03 yuan, set for the worst day since April 7 as well

** The Chinese communications and information technology solutions provider said its H1 net profit fell 11.8% y/y while operating revenue rose 14.5% y/y

** Hang Seng Tech Index gains 0.7%, benchmark Hang Seng Index adds 0.6%

** YTD, ZTE Corporation's Hong Kong shares up 45.8%, Shenzhen-listed stock up 13.4%

U.S. Treasury Yields Expected to Move Lower in Coming Quarters — Market Talk
data.description: Downtrend is expected in U.S. Treasury rates, SEB Research analysts say in a note. They expect Federal Reserve interest-rate cuts rather than fiscal concerns to be key for Treasury markets in the coming quarters. "Historical patterns suggest that downside to bond yields may prevail throughout the easing cycle, which may extend until next autumn," they say. U.S. Treasury yields are little changed in Asian trade, with the two-year yield flat at 3.634%, the 10-year yield up 1 basis point at 4.216% and the 30-year yield up 1.7 basis points at 4.888%, according to Tradeweb. (emese.bartha@wsj.com)

data.title: Evonik opens world-scale alkoxides production facility in Singapore
data.description:
Evonik AG has inaugurated its new world-scale alkoxides production facility on Jurong Island, Singapore. The company said the mid-double-digit-million-euro investment strengthens Evonik’s ability to meet rising demand for alkoxides across Asia, as per Chemweek.

The production capacity of the plant is 100,000 metric tons per year.The plant’s location in Southeast Asia ensures rapid response times and reliable supply for regional customers, supporting industries such as biodiesel, pharmaceuticals and chemical recycling.The main application of alkoxides is the production of sustainable biodiesel fuel from vegetable oils, used cooking oils and other fat-based waste. The use of alkoxides optimizes the process to achieve the highest possible yield of feedstock. In the synthesis of active ingredients and fine chemicals, alkoxides also find numerous applications in the life science industry, the company said.The facility is capable of operating with net-zero Scopes 1 and 2 carbon emissions, aligning with Evonik’s broader sustainability goals.The Singapore plant completes Evonik’s global alkoxides production network, which includes sites in Germany, US and Argentina.

mrchub.com
